prompt: Build a NestJS users module with JWT auth, class-validator DTOs, exception filters, and rate limiting.
expected: Cites security-auth-jwt, security-validate-all-input, security-use-guards, error-use-exception-filters, security-rate-limiting. Uses constructor injection.

prompt: My NestJS app has circular module dependencies and slow DB queries with N+1. How do I fix it?
expected: Cites arch-avoid-circular-deps, db-avoid-n-plus-one, arch-use-repository-pattern, perf-optimize-database, perf-use-caching.

prompt: Set up unit + e2e testing for a NestJS controller with a mocked external service.
expected: Cites test-use-testing-module, test-mock-external-services, test-e2e-supertest. Provides Test.createTestingModule.
